economics.moqLine: We load full {{containerType}} containers — {{moqLabel}} — and you can mix sizes and grades inside one. There is no sub-container retail option; first-time buyers start with a free sample.

cafe.metaTitle: Bulk Shisha Charcoal for Cafés & Lounges
cafe.metaDescriptionTemplate: Bulk coconut shisha charcoal for cafés & lounges from {{brand}}, {{port}}: long-burn cubes in master-box packing, lowest cost per session. MOQ {{moqTons}} tons.
cafe.h1: Wholesale Coconut Shisha Charcoal for Cafés & Lounges
cafe.atAGlanceDefinition: Cafés and lounges burn coals by the kilogram, every night, so the numbers that matter are cost per session and burn length — not shelf design. The lowest landed cost comes from larger cubes in bulk master-box packing.
cafe.needBody: A high-turnover venue cares about three things: how long a coal holds heat (fewer changes per session), how clean it burns (less ash on the table, fewer interruptions), and what a kilogram costs landed. Larger cubes hold heat longer per piece, so staff change coals less often during a busy service; a low-ash grade keeps the session clean from the first guest to the last. Retail printing adds cost you do not need behind the counter, so bulk packing wins.
cafe.packagingBody: Order bulk master-box packing: sealed inner plastic inside a corrugated master box ({{masterBoxSizes}}), no printed retail inner box. It is the lowest cost per kilogram and the fastest to stock behind a bar.
cafe.gettingStartedBody: Start with a proven, fast-moving SKU — a 26–28 mm cube in Super Premium grade — and order a free sample to confirm the burn in your own lounge before the first container. Most café accounts standardize on one size and reorder it; once your volume is steady, Platinum is the upgrade that lets a flagship venue charge for the session.

recos.why: The largest cube holds heat the longest, so staff change coals least often during a busy service.
A larger cube in a clean, low-ash grade keeps long lounge sessions interruption-free to the last guest.
Flats give maximum surface area for kaloud and large-bowl setups common in high-volume venues.

shop.metaDescriptionTemplate: Private-label coconut shisha charcoal for smoke shops & retail from {{brand}}: printed inner boxes, OEM/white-label, small packs. MOQ {{moqTons}} tons FOB {{port}}.
shop.h1: Wholesale Coconut Shisha Charcoal for Smoke Shops & Retail
shop.atAGlanceDefinition: Smoke shops and retailers sell on shelf appeal and brand. The winning unit is a smaller cube or hexagonal in a printed inner box — ideally one that carries your brand, not ours.
shop.needBody: Retail moves on what the customer sees: a clean printed box, a recognizable size, and a brand. The standard retail unit is a printed 1 kg inner box of 25 mm cubes or hexagonals; hexagonals add shelf distinction and even ignition. Premium and Super Premium grades hit the price point a shelf needs, and private label turns a commodity coal into your brand.
shop.packagingBody: Choose printed inner boxes ({{innerBoxSizes}}) on {{innerBoxGsm}} gsm board, and consider OEM / white-label so the box carries your brand. A printed 1 kg box is the standard retail unit.
shop.gettingStartedBody: If you are building a brand, validate first and brand second: order a proven 25 mm cube SKU to confirm demand, then move to private label — the same briquette in a box that carries your name. Our guides walk through both steps, from first SKU to full OEM.

recos.why: The retail-standard cube size; the proven SKU to validate demand before private label.
Same size, one grade up — the clean-burning option for a brand that wants a quality story.
Hexagonals add shelf distinction and even ignition; a strong private-label differentiator.
